asset_name: Tesamorelin Authorised Product, Identity and Regulatory Source Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Authorised product and molecular identity evidence
controlled_conclusion: EGRIFTA WR is an exact tesamorelin prescription biologic for reduction of excess abdominal fat in adults with HIV-associated lipodystrophy. The current label states that it is not indicated for weight-loss management and that the 11.6 mg EGRIFTA WR formulation has product-specific instructions. Supplier TSM powders do not inherit the authorised formulation, indication, excipients, quality or label.

sources.title: EGRIFTA WR current United States prescribing information

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised finished product to catalogue supplier powder
Transfer from trial material to unverified supplier material
Creation of dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
next_review_trigger: Material label, indication, safety, regulatory, trial, manufacturer, quality or supplier-evidence change
